positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon cradling a cluster of geometric stars and abstract celestial constellations. The style is modern celestial engraving, combining the clean lines of linocut printmaking with the ethereal glow of bioluminescence. Dominant colors are deep indigo blue, milky silver, and burnt gold accents. The composition should be perfectly centered and contained within a circular or oval frame, providing a clean silhouette suitable for repeating pattern elements. Use high contrast, negative space, and crisp, vector-art quality details. Emphasize symmetry and geometric balance. The overall mood is mystical, calming, and elegant.
